name: Gold Tone Four Leaf Clover Necklace
description: Bring a touch of luck and delicate beauty to your everyday look with this gold-tone four-leaf clover necklace. Featuring a polished clover pendant and a sparkling crystal accent on a delicate beaded satellite chain, complete with an anti-tarnish finish.

media.alt_text: Gold tone four-leaf clover pendant necklace with a crystal charm on a beaded chain

faqs.question: What type of chain does this necklace have?
faqs.answer: This necklace features a delicate and elegant beaded satellite chain that beautifully complements the clover pendant.

faqs.question: Will the gold tone fade quickly?
faqs.answer: No, it is treated with a premium anti-tarnish coating to ensure long-lasting shine and durability for daily wear.

meta_title: Gold Tone Four Leaf Clover Necklace | Anti-Tarnish
meta_description: Shop our Gold Tone Four Leaf Clover Necklace. Featuring a lucky clover pendant, a sparkling crystal charm, and an anti-tarnish finish on a beaded chain.
